## pf find last-pixel

Print the RGB colour of the bottom-right pixel of a region

```
pf find last-pixel [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help          help for last-pixel
      --rect string   x0,y0,x1,y1 (default "0,0,100,100")
```
